title: Torrezx-Trial tools
description: New trial tools set ! Rename tools to obtain them
body:
Torrezx-Trial tools 

ENGLISH
Go to the trial chambers in style with this new set of trial chamber-inspired items.

ESPAÑOL
Ve con estilo a las trial chambers con este nuevo set de items 

inspirados en las trial chamber.

1.21.5x-1.21.11 Rename in anvil tools copper,iron,diamond and netherite to:

-Trial sword

-Trial pickaxe

-Trial bow

-Trial axe

-Trial shovel

-Trial hoe

-Trial crossbow

In 1.20x-1.21x-1.21.4 Reemplaza-Replace :
-Diamond tools

Requerimientos-Requirements:
-No requiere de ningún complemento-Does not require any complement

Twitter: [Torrezx](https://x.com/TorrezxMC)
